sentences.text: The wheelbarrow is worth more than the plank, but true friendship doesn't care about that.
Please get the plank quickly, and I will start working on my barn today.
Certainly, said little Hans, and he ran to the shed to get the plank.
He pulled the plank out of the shed and brought it to the Miller.
